name: Lohagarh Desert Resort
description: Serene luxury nestled on the banks of Lake Pichola, offering private pool villas and exquisite dining.

dining.heading: Culinary Heritage
dining.content: Indulge in an exquisite culinary journey at Lohagarh Fort Resort. Our restaurants offer a curated selection of authentic Rajasthani cuisine, pan-Indian delicacies, and international flavors prepared by our award-winning chefs using locally sourced ingredients and age-old royal recipes.

cards.content: A regal setting for an unforgettable dining experience with traditional Rajasthani thali and more.

cards.title: Poolside Kitchen
cards.content: Casual dining by the pool with grills, kebabs, and refreshing beverages under the open sky.

fact-sheet.title: At a Glance
fact-sheet.description: Everything you need to know about Lohagarh Fort Resort at a glance.

name: Lohagarh Fort Resort
title: Experience one of a kind
description: Discover Lohagarh Fort Resort, the finest destination for a luxurious and regal wedding experience in Jaipur. Nestled in the charming Kukas Village, our award-winning property offers breathtaking views of the majestic Aravalli Mountains. Recognized as the best resort in Jaipur, it is spread across vast, pristine landscapes known as Nature Ranches and draws inspiration from the Earth, nature, habitat, and art. As you explore our resort, you'll find yourself surrounded by lush greenery and tranquil water features, creating a serene atmosphere that harmonizes with the soothing sounds of nature. Meandering pathways lead you through the property, inviting guests to uncover its beauty at every turn. Our resort is a unique fusion of natural beauty, rich heritage, top-notch amenities, and a spiritual journey. Whether it's for weddings, leisure, or celebrations, Lohagarh Fort Resort promises an unforgettable experience, truly living up to its name as the best resort in Jaipur.

name: Lohagarh Corbett Resort
title: Luxury Wilderness Retreat
description: Experience the epitome of luxury at Lohagarh Corbett Resort, nestled in the heart of Jim Corbett National Park, Nainital. Renowned as an idyllic weekend escape for travelers from Uttarakhand and neighboring cities, our resort offers unparalleled hospitality amidst nature's embrace. Discover a distinctive array of accommodations at Lohagarh Corbett Resort, ranging from charming Village Theme Rooms to opulent Luxury Suites and cozy Deluxe Rooms. Situated right on the cusp of the forest within Jim Corbett National Park, our resort seamlessly combines tranquility with vibrant activity.
